insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insight into where you need to focus your efforts to improve. By taking that initial step, you'll be able to identify areas of strength and weakness, and develop a personalized plan to boost your score and build a streak, setting yourself up for long-term success and momentum.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
